title: Formation Flight c18 focused boundary-source final-cycle temporal trace
scientificQuestion: When during the final converged c18 wingbeat is the selected leader q5 reflected-momentum source strongest, and how is its time variation associated with near versus far interpolation topology?

rationale.why: The archive-only residual selector found that leader q5 reflected momentum exchange accounts for 21.7875 percent of the positive systematic residual-alignment ledger with three-of-three subcell sign agreement. A single final-cycle trace is therefore more informative than another broad parameter sweep.
rationale.roi: One existing read-only direction census per final-cycle step records 4820 compact samples while reusing the already paid c18 transient. It avoids 35 irrelevant direction-owner dispatches per step, avoids flow-slice allocation, and checks its own non-intrusion against the locked c18 anchor and load summaries.

captureContract.timing: after current-step geometry and owner-load reads, before the fluid collision-stream step, matching the locked phase census
captureContract.scope: exactly one owner and one moving D3Q19 direction at every step of the final cycle
captureContract.storage: one compact GPUFormationBoundarySourceCensus record per step; no flow fields or cell-times-direction archive

temporalAnalysis.centeredEnergySignal: squared deviation of phase-binned reflectedMomentumExchange from its cycle mean
temporalAnalysis.windowRule: shortest contiguous circular phase-bin window containing at least the target share; ties choose the earliest start bin
temporalAnalysis.topologyTurnover: absolute near-fraction change plus absolute far-fraction change plus relative link-count change between adjacent periodic steps
temporalAnalysis.interpretationBoundary: branch counts measure topology occupancy and association, not independent population contribution assigned to each branch

decisionRule.thresholdBasis: A uniform centered-energy signal needs one-half cycle to contain half its energy; 0.35 demands meaningful temporal concentration. Absolute Pearson association 0.35 is a moderate preregistered topology signal, explaining at least about 12 percent of linear variance without being treated as causation.

nextActions.temporallyLocalizedBranchAssociated: trace c16 and c20 only across the selected circular phase window and preserve branch-resolved occupancy to test whether the q5 h-linear residual is generated at the same topology transition
nextActions.temporallyLocalizedMixedBranches: trace c16 and c20 only across the selected circular phase window; prioritize population terms over branch attribution because c18 topology occupancy is mixed
nextActions.cycleDistributedBranchAssociated: do not narrow by phase; use sparse matched-phase c16 and c20 traces stratified by near and far occupancy
nextActions.cycleDistributedMixedBranches: stop q5 temporal localization; return to the archived opposite-direction pair and component ledger before more CFD

claimBoundary: This one c18 trace can localize the timing and topology association of the selected absolute q5 source and can verify diagnostic non-intrusion. It cannot by itself localize the cross-grid residual in time, prove a branch causes that residual, establish source or power convergence, justify a force-law correction, quantify formation benefit, or support a biological claim.
